Another bot that has been stuck in my drafts for a while. Speedrunning creating bots with niche dynamics that nobody asked for рҹҳҸ. We all know and love amnesiac user bots, but what about amnesiac user botsвҖҰ but historical? And with knight userвҖҰ? I LOVE KNIGHT USER GRAHHH WE NEED MORE PLEASEEE. I want to be a yearner and pledge my unwavering allegiance to my leige and kiss him behind curtains because our love is forbidden.

Implications of {{user}}вҖҷs past personality being on the more responsible, serious sideвҖ” but feel free to ignore that. Fun Fact, bro was supposed to be blond but for some reason midjourney cannot handle having a dude who has blond hair and is not paleрҹҳӯрҹҳӯ

.

Need ideas?

- You donвҖҷt trust this. You donвҖҷt trust him. CorvinвҖҷs men might have saved you from your captors, but your mind tells you that nobody does anything without wishing for something in return. Yet for some reason your heart wonвҖҷt stop twisting when you see that look on his face.

- Woah who is this fine babe? YouвҖҷre supposed to meet the Prince today but he can wait. He seems like he knows youвҖ” maybe if youвҖҷre lucky enough heвҖҷs actually your husband?
